title: dioscorea deltoidea
intro: Dioscorea deltoidea, also known as the wild yam or Mexican wild yam, is a type of perennial plant native to North America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea deltoidea include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as improved immune function and skin health. Dioscorea deltoidea is often prepared as a tincture, capsule, or topical cream, and can be found in various herbal preparations, such as supplements and skincare products.
